title: 'My work is done': Keir Starmer bows out as PM, says UK 'stronger & fairer'
summary_full: Keir Starmer has resigned as the United Kingdom's prime minister after two years in office. Andy Burnham will now formally become Britain's prime minister following Starmer's departure. Burnham takes office after replacing Starmer as Labour leader on Friday. The parliamentary system allows for such leadership changes without a general election. Burnham pledged to restore political stability and make politics less toxic.
